name: Infected Larva

attacks.name: Bite
attacks.tell: It lunges in close and bites with a direct snap.
attacks.howToAvoid: Block it or step out before it fully closes the gap.
attacks.notes: It shares this bite with the normal larva.

attacks.name: Combo Bite
attacks.tell: It gets into range and strings several short bites together.
attacks.howToAvoid: Do not punish between hits unless you have already knocked it off rhythm.
attacks.notes: It can still drain a lot of health if you stay in front of it.

attacks.name: Charged Bite
attacks.tell: It tenses up for a brief moment before lunging faster.
attacks.howToAvoid: Dodge sideways at the last moment.
attacks.notes: It hits harder than its normal bites, but gives a better punish window on whiff.

attacks.name: Back Explosion
attacks.tell: It charges up its back and sets off two short-range explosions on both sides.
attacks.howToAvoid: Back off as soon as it starts swelling; the radius is short, but lethal if you stay close.
attacks.notes: This is its special infected move and it can also trigger on death.

description: A larva corrupted by the Haze fungus. It looks sluggish until it triggers the explosions on its back and turns the fight into a close-range trap.
behavior: It is one of the laziest infected creatures, often sleeping in cracks or wandering aimlessly. Once combat starts, it gives up any instinct to flee and presses the fight until death.
interactionWithPlayer: It is extremely aggressive toward the player. Its real danger is not the bite itself, but staying too close when it primes the back explosion.
interactionWithCreatures: It attacks almost every non-infected creature and stays neutral only toward other infected ones until accidental damage starts a fight.
strategy: Do not stay glued to it longer than necessary. Punish a bite, back away, then go back in; if you overextend, the back explosion can erase your advantage.
respawnInfo: 1 day by default. Outside the Haze it takes 3 days.

combatStats.attackDamageSummary:
Bite: 50
Combo Bite: 50
Charged Bite: 60
Back Explosion: 68

specialTraits: It is immune to gas hazard and, unlike a normal larva, does not flee at low health. It can also explode on death.
